headline: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) Gets Upgraded by UBS on Upcoming Pipeline Catalysts
summary: Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB) is one of the best stem cell therapy stocks to buy. On April 22, Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB) was upgraded to Buy from Neutral by UBS, with the firm adjusting the price target on the stock to $225 from $185. It told investors in a research note that it has increased conviction on the […]
